info.title: Dev.to API .Net CLI Tool
info.description: This .Net console tool allows you to interact with some parts the Dev.to API and helps with posting articles from Github repos.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: new-api-key
commands.description: Adds new Dev.to API key to this tool as a JSON settings file

options.name: api-key
options.description: Your Dev.to API Key - Required

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: list-all-articles
commands.description: Lists all of your Dev.to articles, published and unpublished

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: prep-article
commands.description: Prepares a Markdown article for posting to Dev.to by replacing image links to point to GitHub repo

options.name: article-path
options.description: The path to the article's Markdown file - Required

options.name: github-user
options.description: Your Github Username - Required

options.name: github-repo
options.description: The name of the article's Github repo - Required

options.name: images-path
options.description: The path within the repo to the images - Required

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: get-article-by-url
commands.description: Gets any Dev.to article using the URL of that article

options.name: url
options.description: The URL of the article - Required

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: post-article
commands.description: Posts a new article to Dev.to

options.name: title
options.description: The title of the new article - Required

options.name: article-path
options.description: The path to the article's Markdown file - Required

options.name: main_image
options.description: The URL of the image to be used as a header image of the article - Optional

options.name: series
options.description: The name of the series the article belongs to - Optional

options.name: published
options.description: Choose whether to publish the article now or not - Optional

options.name: tags
options.description: A list of tags to attach to the article - Optional

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: update-article
commands.description: Posts a new article to Dev.to

options.name: url
options.description: Url of the article to be updated - Required

options.name: article-path
options.description: Path to the Markdown file of the article - Required

options.name: title
options.description: Title of the new article - Optional

options.name: main-image
options.description: Url to image to be used as a header image on the article - Optional

options.name: series
options.description: Name of the series the article belongs to - Optional

options.name: published
options.description: Whether or not the article should be published by this request - Optional

options.name: tags
options.description: Tags to attach to the article - Optional

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information
